LOCAL.accuracy.baseValue.text: Accuracy = 1 / 2 of your combined Mind and Training in Ranged Weapons, rounded up.
LOCAL.accuracy.desc.text:
Accuracy measures your effectiveness with ranged attacks, and affects the Difficulty of ranged attacks you make.

Your Accuracy is equal to 1 / 2 of your combined Mind and Training in Ranged Weapons, rounded up.
LOCAL.arcana.desc.text: Arcana measures how much you know about arcane magic and creatures.
LOCAL.armor.baseValue.text: Your Armor is determined by what gear, effects, and abilities you possess.
LOCAL.armor.desc.text:
Armor decreases the amount of Damage taken when you are hit by attacks and spells.

Your Armor is determined by what gear, effects, and abilities you possess.
LOCAL.armor.encumbering.desc.text: When wearing armor with the Encumbering trait, you have Disadvantage on checks to Swim, Fly, or Climb.
LOCAL.armor.heavy.desc.text: While wearing Heavy armor, all your speeds are decreased by -1, and you have Greater Disadvantage on checks to Swim, Fly, or Climb. You cannot Jump while wearing Heavy armor.
LOCAL.armor.loud.desc.text: When wearing armor with the Loud trait, you have Disadvantage on checks to remain undetected by creatures with hearing.
LOCAL.armor.magical.desc.text: Magical armor and shields cannot be destroyed by non-magical Rend attacks.
LOCAL.athletics.desc.text: Athletics is your ability to perform acts of physical prowess.
LOCAL.attack.blast.desc.text:
Blast attacks apply their damage to all unobstructed creatures within the listed Blast radius of the center of the attack.

For example, an attack with Blast 1 would damage all unobstructed creatures within 1 space of the center of the attack.
LOCAL.attack.cleave.desc.text: Each roll of 6 on an attack with the Cleave trait deals 1 Damage to all other enemies adjacent to the attacker.
LOCAL.attack.close.desc.text: Ranged attacks with the Close trait do not suffer a penalty to Accuracy when attacking an adjacent enemy.
LOCAL.attack.crushing.desc.text: A Crushing attack is heavy and solid, and deals bludgeoning blows to enemies.
LOCAL.attack.flurry.desc.text: Attacks with the Flurry trait round up when splitting their dice pool in half for Multi-Attacks.
LOCAL.attack.ineffective.desc.text: Armor is doubled against Ineffective attacks, and Ineffective attacks can only inflict 1 Wound per attack.
LOCAL.attack.loud.desc.text: An attack with the Loud trait alerts everyone within hearing range when it is used.
LOCAL.attack.magical.desc.text: Magical attacks are effective against magical defenses, and can destroy Magical items.
LOCAL.attack.piercing.desc.text: Piercing attacks use a sharp point or tip to stab and skewer enemies.
LOCAL.attack.push.desc.text: If you hit and deal damage on an attack with the Push trait, you may move the target 1 space away from you, provided it is no more than 1 Size larger than you.
LOCAL.attack.reload.desc.text: Attacks with the Reload trait require an Action to be reloaded after an attack before they can be used again.
LOCAL.attack.rend.desc.text:
Each roll of 6 with a Rend attack destroys 1 point of Armor after the damage is applied.

Magical armor can only be destroyed by Magical weapons.
LOCAL.attack.restraining.desc.text: When a Restraining attack deals damage to a creature up to 1 Size larger than the attacker, that creature is Restrained until it uses an Action to free itself.
LOCAL.attack.slashing.desc.text: A Slashing attack is sharp and typically bladed, and is used to cut enemies open.
LOCAL.attack.splash.desc.text: Attacks with the Splash trait apply half their damage to all unobstructed creatures adjacent to the target.
LOCAL.attack.twoHanded.desc.text: A Two-Handed attack requires at least two hands to use.
LOCAL.attack.vicious.desc.text: When a Vicious attack inflicts Wounds, the number of Wounds inflicted increases by +1.
LOCAL.awareness.baseValue.text: Awareness = 1 / 2 of your combined Mind and Training in Perception, rounded up.
LOCAL.awareness.desc.text:
Awareness is your passive alertness and attention to detail.

Your Awareness is equal to 1 / 2 of your combined Mind and Training in Perception, rounded up.
LOCAL.blinded.desc.text:
A Blinded creature cannot see.

A Blinded creature automatically fails any Awareness and Perception checks that rely on sight.

A Blinded creature's Melee, Accuracy, and Defense decrease by -1.
LOCAL.body.desc.text:
Body is your overall strength, speed, and coordination. Characters with a high Body tend to do well in a physical fight and excel at manual labor.

Body affects your Melee (your effectiveness in close combat) and your Defense (your ability to avoid damage).

Body also greatly affects your Resilience (your ability to endure pain and resist illnesses) and slightly affects your Reflexes (your ability to duck, dodge, and avoid sudden danger).
LOCAL.burrow.desc.text: Burrow is the ability to move by digging through the ground.
LOCAL.check.attackType.desc.text: The type of attack to use for calculating the Difficulty of the Check.
LOCAL.check.attackerAccuracy.desc.text: The attacker's Accuracy to use for calculating the Difficulty of the Check.
LOCAL.check.attackerMelee.desc.text: The attacker's Melee to use for calculating the Difficulty of the Check.
LOCAL.check.attribute.desc.text: The Attribute to use for the Check.
LOCAL.check.complexity.desc.text: The minimum number of Successes needed.
LOCAL.check.damageMod.desc.text: Bonuses / Penalties to the amount of Damage to inflict.
LOCAL.check.damageReducedBy.desc.text: Whether the Damage inflicted by the Check can be reduced by an Opposed Check or a Resistance Check.
LOCAL.check.diceMod.desc.text: Bonuses / Penalties to the number of Dice rolled.
LOCAL.check.difficulty.desc.text: The minimum roll on a die to achieve a Success.
LOCAL.check.doubleExpertise.desc.text: Whether to double the Expertise applied.
LOCAL.check.doubleTraining.desc.text: Whether to double the Training applied.
LOCAL.check.expertiseMod.desc.text: Bonuses / Penalties to the amount Expertise to apply.
LOCAL.check.healingMod.desc.text: Bonuses / Penalties to the amount of Healing to apply.
LOCAL.check.initialValue.desc.text: The base value of Healing or Damage on a successful check.
LOCAL.check.isDamage.desc.text: Whether this Check inflicts Damage on a target.
LOCAL.check.isHealing.desc.text: Whether this Check applies Healing to a target.
LOCAL.check.opposedCheck.attribute.desc.text: The Attribute used by the Opposed Check.
LOCAL.check.opposedCheck.enabled.desc.text: Whether this Check can be counteracted by an Opposed Check.
LOCAL.check.opposedCheck.skill.desc.text: The Skill used by the Opposed Check.
LOCAL.check.resistance.desc.text: Whether this Check can be counteracted by a Resistance Check, and if so, which Resistance to use.
LOCAL.check.resolveCost.desc.text: The Resolve that must be spent to roll this Check.
LOCAL.check.scaling.desc.text: Whether the Check's Damage or Healing should scale with extra successes.
LOCAL.check.skill.desc.text: The Skill to use for the Check.
LOCAL.check.targetDefense.desc.text: The defender's Defense to use for calculating the Difficulty of the Check.
LOCAL.check.totalDice.desc.text: The total number of dice to be rolled.
LOCAL.check.totalExpertise.desc.text: The total amount of Expertise to apply.
LOCAL.climb.desc.text: Climb is the ability to easily move by grasping handholds.
LOCAL.confirmDeleteEffect.desc.text: Are you sure you want to delete this effect from this actor?
LOCAL.confirmDeleteItem.desc.text: Are you sure you want to delete this item from this actor?
LOCAL.confirmRegenerateUUID.desc.text: Are you sure you want to regenerate this document's Unique ID? This will break any macros that were created for this document using the Unique ID Method.
LOCAL.confirmRemoveExpiredEffects.desc.text: Are you sure you want to remove all expired Effects from this actor?
LOCAL.contaminated.desc.text: A Contaminated creature has a -1 penalty to all Attributes and Resistances.
LOCAL.damage.baseValue.text: Determined by what gear, effects, and abilities you possess.
LOCAL.damage.desc.text:
Bonuses and penalties to the Damage you deal.

Determined by what gear, effects, and abilities you possess.
LOCAL.dead.desc.text: A Dead creature can take no actions of any kind.
LOCAL.deafened.desc.text:
A Deafened creature cannot hear.

A Deafened creature automatically fails any Awareness and Perception checks that rely on hearing.
LOCAL.deception.desc.text: Deception is your ability to lie and mislead.
LOCAL.defaultAttribute.desc.text: The default Attribute to use when rolling this Skill.
LOCAL.defense.baseValue.text: Defense = 1 / 2 of your combined Body and Training in Dexterity, rounded up.
LOCAL.defense.desc.text:
Defense is your ability to defend against attacks, and affects the Difficulty of attacks made against you.

Your Defense is equal to 1 / 2 of your combined Body and Training in Dexterity, rounded up.
LOCAL.dexterity.desc.text: Dexterity measures your ability to perform tasks requiring coordination, grace, and flexibility.
LOCAL.diplomacy.desc.text: Diplomacy allows you to influence others through negotiation and flattery.
LOCAL.editLinkedToken.desc.text:
Edit the Token used by this Actor.

Since this Actor is linked to their Token, this will affect ALL linked instances of this Actor.
LOCAL.editUUID.desc.text:
WARNING: The Unique ID of a document is generated by the TITAN System when a document is created. It does not change if the document is edited or duplicated, and can optionally be used to identify a document for user-created macros.

Editing the Unique ID will break macros created using the Unique ID Identify method, unless you update the macros to use the new Unique ID.

You may want to do this if you have duplicated a document as a base for other documents and want to prevent macros from identifying the duplicates as the original.
LOCAL.editUnlinkedToken.desc.text:
Edit the Token used by this Actor.

Since this Actor is NOT linked to their Token, this will affect ONLY this and any future instances of this Actor.
LOCAL.editedUUIDForDocumentX%.text: Edited Unique ID for document: X%
LOCAL.effect.initiative.desc.text: Effect duration progresses on a given Initiative in turn order.
LOCAL.effect.permanent.desc.text: Effect is Permanent until it is removed.
LOCAL.effectTrayConfirmDelete.desc.text: Are you sure you want to delete this effect from this compendium?
LOCAL.effectTrayEmpty.text: No effects yet — create one or drag an effect here.
LOCAL.effectTrayNoTargets.text: Select or target a token to apply an effect.
LOCAL.engineering.desc.text: Engineering is your ability to create, understand, and repair complex items.
LOCAL.expertise.desc.text: Each point of Expertise allows you to increase the result of a dice rolled with this Skill.
LOCAL.fastHealing.desc.text: While affected by Fast Healing, a combatant will heal the designated amount every turn.
LOCAL.fastHealingRevert.desc.text: While affected by Fast Healing, a combatant will heal the designated amount every turn.
LOCAL.fly.desc.text: Fly is the ability to move by soaring through the atmosphere.
LOCAL.frightened.desc.text:
A Frightened creature cannot willingly move closer to the source of their fear.

While the creature can detect the source of its fear, it suffers a -1 dice penalty to all checks.
LOCAL.healing.baseValue.text: Determined by what gear, effects, and abilities you possess.
LOCAL.healing.desc.text:
Bonuses and penalties to the Healing you perform.

Determined by what gear, effects, and abilities you possess.
LOCAL.idMethod.desc.text:
This is the method by which the macro will attempt to identify the item.

Unique ID - The item will be identified by its unique ID that is generated on item creation. Compatible across actors, but may mis-identify items that were duplicated from others without regenerating their Unique ID.

Item Name - The item will be identified by the name of the item. Compatible across actors, but may mis-identify items that use the same name.

Item ID - The item will be identified by the ID of the item given to it by Foundry. Not compatible across actors, but will never mis-identify an item.
LOCAL.importActorToWorld.text: Import this Actor to the game world.
LOCAL.importItemToWorld.text: Import this Item to the game world.
LOCAL.incapacitated.desc.text:
An Incapacitated creature cannot Move, take Actions, or spend Resolve.

Incapacitated creatures cannot defend themselves. The Difficulty to hit an Incapacitated creature is always 2, and they automatically fail Reflexes checks.
LOCAL.initiative.baseValue.text: Initiative = 1 / 2 of your combined Mind and Training in both Dexterity and Perception, rounded up.
LOCAL.initiative.desc.text:
Initiative is your general readiness, and determines your turn order in combat.

Initiative is equal to 1 / 2 of your combined Mind and Training in both Dexterity and Perception, rounded up.
LOCAL.inspiration.desc.text:
Inspiration is given as a reward for role-play.

You can spend your Inspiration to:

  • Gain Advantage on a Check

  • Recover from Dying at the start of your turn

  • Immediately regain 1 Resolve
LOCAL.intimidation.desc.text: Intimidation allows you to bend others to your will using threats.
LOCAL.investigation.desc.text: Investigation measures your ability to find and make deductions from clues.
LOCAL.longRest.desc.text: Completing a Long Rest fully restores your Stamina and Resolve, and decreases your Wounds by -1.
LOCAL.lore.desc.text: Lore measures your overall depth of knowledge in topics you are familiar with.
LOCAL.confirmMigrateWorld.desc.text: Some documents in this world need to be updated to the current system version. Would you like to migrate now? Do not close the game during migration.
LOCAL.medicine.desc.text: Medicine is your ability to patch up wounds and treat diseases and poisons.
LOCAL.melee.baseValue.text: Melee = 1 / 2 of your combined Body and Training in Melee Weapons, rounded up.
LOCAL.melee.desc.text:
Melee measures your effectiveness with close-range attacks, and affects the Difficulty of melee attacks you make.

Your Melee is equal to 1 / 2 of your combined Body and Training in Melee Weapons, rounded up.
LOCAL.meleeWeapons.desc.text: Melee Weapons measures your proficiency with close-range weapons.
LOCAL.metaphysics.desc.text: Metaphysics measures your overall understanding of spiritual concepts and creatures.
LOCAL.migrationStarted.text: Migrating Titan world data. Please do not close the game.
LOCAL.mind.desc.text:
Mind represents your intelligence, your awareness, and your ability to think on your feet. Characters with a high Mind are often inquisitive, quick witted, and adept at thinking their way around a problem.

Mind affects your Accuracy (your ability with ranged weapons), your Initiative (how quickly your turn comes in combat), and your Awareness of your surroundings.

Mind also greatly affects your Reflexes (your ability to duck, dodge, and avoid sudden danger) and slightly affects your Willpower (your ability to resist mental attacks).
LOCAL.nature.desc.text: Nature measures how much you know about the natural world, and your ability to command and train beasts.
LOCAL.perception.desc.text: Perception measures your ability to be aware of your environment and find hidden details.
LOCAL.performance.desc.text: Performance is your ability to act in character or entertain an audience.
LOCAL.persistentDamage.desc.text: While affected by Persistent Damage, a combatant will take the designated amount of damage every turn.
LOCAL.persistentDamageRevert.desc.text: While affected by Persistent Damage, a combatant will take the designated amount of damage every turn.
LOCAL.prone.desc.text:
A Prone creature has their speed reduced by half, rounded up.

The creature's Melee and Accuracy are decreased by -1.

A creature attacking a Prone creature within 1 space increases their Melee or Accuracy by +1.

A creature attacking a Prone target at a distance greater than 1 space decreases their Accuracy by -1 per 10 spaces, rounded down.

Standing up from Prone may be done with a Move or an Action.
LOCAL.rangedWeapons.desc.text: Ranged Weapons measures your proficiency with ranged weapons in combat.
LOCAL.rarity.desc.text:
Rarity represents how readily an item, spell, or ability may be found in the world.

Common items and abilities are easy to find in places where objects and abilities of this sort exist. Most shops, mages, and temples should have access to them.

Uncommon items and abilities can be found by those who know where to look. Characters may need to perform a service or task to gain access.

Rare items and abilities are extremely difficult to find. They are almost never readily available, and searching for them can be an adventure in itself.

Unique items and abilities are among the most powerful and sought after in the world. Obtaining them may be the goal of an entire adventuring arc.
LOCAL.reflexes.desc.text:
Reflexes is your ability to duck, dodge, and avoid sudden danger.

Your Reflexes are equal to your Mind + 1 / 2 of your Body, rounded down.
LOCAL.regeneratedUUIDForDocumentX%.text: Regenerated Unique ID for document: X%
LOCAL.removeCombatEffects.desc.text: Remove temporary Effects and fully restore this character's Resolve.
LOCAL.resilience.desc.text:
Resilience is your ability to endure pain and resist illnesses.

Your Resilience is equal to your Body + 1 / 2 of your Soul, rounded down.
LOCAL.resolve.desc.text:
Resolve is your ability to push yourself beyond your normal limits.

1 Resolve is regained at the start of your turn in Combat.

You may spend Resolve during Combat to:

  • Perform an extra Action.

  • Use an Ability that requires Resolve.

  • Re-roll failures on a Check.

  • Double your Training on a check, before the roll is made.

  • Double your Expertise on a check, before or after the roll is made.
LOCAL.resolveRegain.desc.text: Characters regain 1 Resolve at the start of their turn.
LOCAL.resolveRegainRevert.desc.text: Characters regain 1 Resolve at the start of their turn.
LOCAL.restrained.desc.text:
A Restrained creature cannot move.

Additionally, their Melee, Accuracy, and Defense decrease by -1, and they automatically fail Reflexes checks.
LOCAL.role.desc.text:
The Role of this character.

Minions are defeated in one hit.

Warriors are defeated after they lose all of their Stamina.

Elites are defeated after they lose all of their Stamina and Wounds.

Champions are defeated after they lose all of their Stamina and Wounds. Additionally, they may use and regain Resolve.
LOCAL.shortRest.desc.text: Completing a Short Rest fully restores your Stamina and Resolve.
LOCAL.sleeping.desc.text: A Sleeping creature has its Awareness reduced by half, rounded up.
LOCAL.soul.desc.text:
Soul represents your determination, sense of self, and spiritual power. Characters with a high Soul are frequently leaders, champions, and orators.

Soul affects your Resolve (your ability to take extra actions or enhance your actions in combat).

Soul also greatly affects your Willpower (your ability to resist mental attacks) and slightly affects your Resilience (your ability to endure pain and resist illnesses).
LOCAL.stamina.desc.text:
Stamina decreases by taking Damage.

When you have no Stamina remaining, any Damage you take increases your Wounds.

You recover all your Stamina when you complete a Short or Long Rest.
LOCAL.stealth.desc.text: Stealth allows you to remain undetected from other creatures.
LOCAL.stride.desc.text: Stride is your speed walking, running, or otherwise moving overland.
LOCAL.stunned.desc.text:
A Stunned creature can take an Action, or a Move, but not both.

A Stunned creature cannot spend Resolve to take an additional Action.

A Stunned creature's Defense decreases by -1.
LOCAL.subterfuge.desc.text: Subterfuge is your ability to steal, pick a lock, or perform other acts involving sleight of hand.
LOCAL.swim.desc.text: Swim is the ability to move through water or other liquids.
LOCAL.toggleTokenLinkedButton.desc.text:
This Actor will NOT be Linked to any tokens that are placed on the map.

Click to Link the Actor to any future Tokens that are placed.
LOCAL.toggleTokenUnlinkedButton.desc.text:
This Actor will be Linked to any tokens that are placed on the map.

Click to Unlink the Actor from any future Tokens that are placed.
LOCAL.training.desc.text: Training increases the amount of dice used when rolling this Skill.
LOCAL.type.desc.text: The Type of creature this character is (Human, Animal, Monster, etc.).
LOCAL.unconscious.desc.text: An Unconscious creature immediately drops anything it is holding, falls Prone, and is Incapacitated.
LOCAL.unlinkTokenButton.desc.text:
This Token is Linked to the Actor in the Database.

Click to Unlink the Token from the Actor.

This is irreversible once a Token is Unlinked.
LOCAL.unlinkedTokenButton.desc.text:
This Token is NOT Linked to the Actor in the Database.

This is irreversible once a Token is Unlinked.
LOCAL.willpower.desc.text:
Willpower is your ability to resist mental attacks.

Your Willpower is equal to your Soul + 1 / 2 of your Mind, rounded down.
LOCAL.wounds.desc.text:
Wounds increase by taking Damage in excess of your remaining Stamina.

You start Dying when you take damage in excess of your maximum Wounds and Stamina.

Your Wounds decrease by -1 when you complete a Long Rest.
LOCAL.xpAvailable.desc.text: The remaining XP available after accounting for the cost of this character's Attributes, Skills, and Abilities.
LOCAL.xpEarned.desc.text: The total XP earned by this character over the course of their adventures.
LOCAL.xpTotalCost.desc.text: The total XP cost of this character's Attributes, Skills, and Abilities.

getCheckOptions.label: Ask for Check Options by Default
getCheckOptions.hint: If true, an options dialog will pop up when rolling a Check. Hold Shift to toggle this setting.

confirmDeletingItems.label: Confirm Deleting Items from Actors
confirmDeletingItems.hint: If true, a confirmation dialog will be displayed when attempting to delete an Item from an Actor. Can be suppressed by holding Shift.

confirmDeletingEffects.label: Confirm Deleting Effects from Actors
confirmDeletingEffects.hint: If true, a confirmation dialog will be displayed when attempting to delete an Effect from an Actor. Can be suppressed by holding Shift.

enableEffectHud.label: Enable Effect HUD
enableEffectHud.hint: If true, a panel listing the active character's conditions and effects is shown on screen, replacing the Visual Active Effects module.

autoOpenCharacterSheetsPlayer.label: Auto-Open Character Sheets (Player Only)
autoOpenCharacterSheetsPlayer.hint: Configure whether to automatically open an owned character's sheet on their turn in combat. This setting only applies to Players.

autoOpenCharacterSheetsGM.label: Auto-Open Character Sheets (GM Only)
autoOpenCharacterSheetsGM.hint: Configure whether to automatically open an owned character's sheet on their turn in combat. This setting only applies to GMs.

theme.label: Theme
theme.hint: The color theme for TITAN sheets, dialogs, and chat messages. Auto follows Foundry's color scheme using the world default themes.

defaultDarkTheme.label: Default Dark Theme
defaultDarkTheme.hint: The TITAN theme used on Auto when Foundry's color scheme is dark.

defaultLightTheme.label: Default Light Theme
defaultLightTheme.hint: The TITAN theme used on Auto when Foundry's color scheme is light.

themeCoreMessages.label: Theme Non-TITAN Chat Messages
themeCoreMessages.hint: Apply the TITAN chat theme to chat messages from Foundry core and other modules.

themeEditor.label: Theme Editor
themeEditor.hint: Customize, export, and import TITAN themes.

initiativeFormula.label: Initiative Formula
initiativeFormula.hint: Optional formula to add to a character's Initiative rating during combat (default is +2d6).

autoApplyFastHealing.label: Auto-Apply Fast Healing
autoApplyFastHealing.hint: When enabled, combatants will automatically apply Fast Healing effects at start or end of their turn, depending on the effect. Show Button will instead display a confirmation button in the chat log.

autoApplyPersistentDamage.label: Auto-Apply Persistent Damage
autoApplyPersistentDamage.hint: When enabled, combatants will automatically apply Persistent Damage effects at start or end of their turn, depending on the effect. Show Button will instead display a confirmation button in the chat log.

autoRegainResolve.label: Auto-Regain Resolve
autoRegainResolve.hint: When enabled, a combatant's Resolve will automatically increase at the start of their turn. Show Button will instead display a confirmation button in the chat log.

autoRevertFastHealing.label: Auto-Revert Fast Healing
autoRevertFastHealing.hint: When Previous Turn is called, controls whether Fast Healing that was applied during the reverted turn is automatically undone. Show Button will instead display a confirmation button in the chat log.

autoRevertPersistentDamage.label: Auto-Revert Persistent Damage
autoRevertPersistentDamage.hint: When Previous Turn is called, controls whether Persistent Damage that was applied during the reverted turn is automatically undone. Show Button will instead display a confirmation button in the chat log.

autoRevertResolveRegain.label: Auto-Revert Resolve Regain
autoRevertResolveRegain.hint: When Previous Turn is called, controls whether Resolve that was regained during the reverted turn is automatically spent back. Show Button will instead display a confirmation button in the chat log.

autoSpendResolveDoubleTraining.label: Auto-Spend Resolve when Doubling Training
autoSpendResolveDoubleTraining.hint: When enabled, a combatant's Resolve will automatically be decreased by 1 when they Double Training on a Check.

autoSpendResolveDoubleExpertise.label: Auto-Spend Resolve when Doubling Expertise
autoSpendResolveDoubleExpertise.hint: When enabled, a combatant's Resolve will automatically be decreased by 1 when they Double Expertise on a Check.

autoSpendResolveReRollFailures.label: Auto-Spend Resolve when Re-rolling Failures
autoSpendResolveReRollFailures.hint: When enabled, a combatant's Resolve will automatically be decreased by 1 when they Re-roll failures on a Check.

autoSpendResolveChecks.label: Auto-Spend Resolve when Using Checks
autoSpendResolveChecks.hint: When enabled, a combatant's Resolve will automatically be decreased when they perform a Check with a Resolve cost.

autoDecreaseEffectDuration.label: Auto-Decrease Effect Duration
autoDecreaseEffectDuration.hint: When enabled, a combatant's temporary effects will automatically decrease their duration by 1 at the start or end of their turn, depending on the effect.

autoRemoveExpiredEffects.label: Auto-Remove Expired Effects
autoRemoveExpiredEffects.hint: When enabled, expired effects will be automatically removed from a combatant at the start or end of their turn, depending on the effect. Show Button will instead display a confirmation button in the chat log.

reportTakingDamage.label: Report Taking Damage
reportTakingDamage.hint: Notify when an actor takes damage.

reportHealingDamage.label: Report Healing Damage
reportHealingDamage.hint: Notify when an actor heals damage.

reportRendingArmor.label: Report Rending Armor
reportRendingArmor.hint: Notify when an actor's armor is reduced by a rend attack.

reportRepairingArmor.label: Report Repairing Armor
reportRepairingArmor.hint: Notify when an actor's armor is repaired.

reportSpendingResolve.label: Report Spending Resolve
reportSpendingResolve.hint: Notify when an actor spends Resolve.

reportRegainingResolve.label: Report Regaining Resolve
reportRegainingResolve.hint: Notify when an actor regains Resolve at the start of their turn.

reportEffects.label: Report Effects
reportEffects.hint: Notify when a character's active Effects are reported at the start of their turn.

staminaBaseMultiplier.label: Base Stamina Multiplier
staminaBaseMultiplier.hint: Base Stamina as a multiple of a character's Body + Mind + Soul.

minionStaminaMultiplier.label: Minion Stamina Multiplier
minionStaminaMultiplier.hint: Additional multiplier applied to the Base Stamina of Minions.

resolveBaseMultiplier.label: Base Resolve Multiplier
resolveBaseMultiplier.hint: Base Resolve as a multiple of a character's Soul.

woundsBaseMultiplier.label: Base Wounds Multiplier
woundsBaseMultiplier.hint: Base Wounds as a multiple of a character's Body + Mind + Soul.

woundsBaseRegain.label: Base Wound Regain
woundsBaseRegain.hint: The base number of Wounds healed when a combatant takes a Long Rest.

resolveBaseRegain.label: Base Resolve Regain
resolveBaseRegain.hint: When Auto-Regain Resolve is not disabled, this is the base amount by which a combatant's Resolve will increase at the start of their turn.

migrationMode.label: Migration Mode
migrationMode.hint: Controls how the TITAN system handles world migration when documents are out of date. Prompt: displays a confirmation dialog before migrating. Automatic: migrates immediately without prompting. Disabled: skips migration entirely.

confirmRegenerateUUID.label: Confirm Regenerating Unique ID
confirmRegenerateUUID.hint: A document's Unique ID is generated by the TITAN system on document creation. This ID allows macros to identify a document even if it is duplicated, its name changes, or multiple documents have the same name. It can be regenerated from the context menu by right-clicking the document. When this setting is true, regenerating the Unique ID will require an additional confirmation dialog to avoid accidental regeneration.

defaultAttribute.arcana.label: Default Attribute (Arcana)
defaultAttribute.arcana.hint: The default Attribute to use for Arcana Checks.

defaultAttribute.athletics.label: Default Attribute (Athletics)
defaultAttribute.athletics.hint: The default Attribute to use for Athletics Checks.

defaultAttribute.deception.label: Default Attribute (Deception)
defaultAttribute.deception.hint: The default Attribute to use for Deception Checks.

defaultAttribute.dexterity.label: Default Attribute (Dexterity)
defaultAttribute.dexterity.hint: The default Attribute to use for Dexterity Checks.

defaultAttribute.diplomacy.label: Default Attribute (Diplomacy)
defaultAttribute.diplomacy.hint: The default Attribute to use for Diplomacy Checks.

defaultAttribute.engineering.label: Default Attribute (Engineering)
defaultAttribute.engineering.hint: The default Attribute to use for Engineering Checks.

defaultAttribute.intimidation.label: Default Attribute (Intimidation)
defaultAttribute.intimidation.hint: The default Attribute to use for Intimidation Checks.

defaultAttribute.investigation.label: Default Attribute (Investigation)
defaultAttribute.investigation.hint: The default Attribute to use for Investigation Checks.

defaultAttribute.lore.label: Default Attribute (Lore)
defaultAttribute.lore.hint: The default Attribute to use for Lore Checks.

defaultAttribute.medicine.label: Default Attribute (Medicine)
defaultAttribute.medicine.hint: The default Attribute to use for Medicine Checks.
